plugins.name: stark-analyze
plugins.description: Multi-domain review and adversarial red-team of designs, execution plans, and PRs, plus review-prompt improvement from assessment feedback. Maps to spec-kit's analyze phase.

plugins.name: stark-constitution
plugins.description: Project setup and session priming — scaffold a dev-docs/standards structure (template/backfill/upgrade modes) and assign a session persona. Maps to spec-kit's constitution phase.

plugins.name: stark-gh
plugins.description: GitHub workflow commands + MCP for stark.

plugins.name: stark-implement
plugins.description: Autonomously execute a development phase end-to-end — implement, PR, review, fix, merge, release — via a paired lead/wing agent loop. Maps to spec-kit's implement phase.

plugins.name: stark-ops
plugins.description: Repository operations beyond the spec-driven pipeline — cut releases, housekeep stale issues/branches/worktrees, run session start/end, and switch GitHub identities.

plugins.name: stark-plan
plugins.description: Turn a design doc into a phased implementation plan, then decompose it into phased GitHub issues with story points and risk labels. Maps to spec-kit's plan + tasks phases.
